join_order.notes: Scan all 86K sub rows, filter fy=2022 (~27K), build custom open-addressing hash: adsh_code→{name_code,cik}. Cap=65536=next_pow2(27K*2). Fits comfortably in L3. Single-pass over num simultaneously builds group_sum[(name_code,cik)] and cik_sum[cik] for both main query and HAVING subquery.

filters.notes: Scan sub.fy (86K * 4B = 344KB, trivial); keep rows where fy==2022. Zone map on sub_fy_zone_map.bin can skip non-qualifying 10K-row blocks.
Resolve USD dict code at runtime via uom_dict.txt (C2). Use num_uom_zone_map.bin to locate contiguous USD segment. Skip blocks where max_val < usd_code || min_val > usd_code.

data_structures.sub_join_hash: open_addressing_hash_map(key=int32_t adsh_code, value={int32_t name_code, int32_t cik}, cap=65536, sentinel=INT32_MIN, bounded_probe_loop)
data_structures.thread_local_group_sum: open_addressing_hash_map(key=uint64_t packed=(name_code<<32|uint32_t(cik)), value=int64_t sum_cents, cap=65536, sized_for_full_cardinality_per_C9)
data_structures.thread_local_cik_sum: open_addressing_hash_map(key=int32_t cik, value=int64_t sum_cents, cap=32768, sized_for_full_cardinality_per_C9)

parallelism.parallel_phase: scan_filter_join_aggregate over USD segment of num (morsel size ~100K rows matching block size)
parallelism.merge_phase: single sequential merge pass over thread-local maps after OpenMP barrier (P17/P20)
parallelism.notes: Thread-local group_sum and cik_sum maps MUST be sized for FULL key cardinality (not /nthreads) per C9. No shared mutable state during scan phase — zero contention.

indexes.purpose: skip_blocks to find contiguous USD segment; layout [uint32_t num_blocks=395][ZoneBlock<int16_t>*395]
skip non-fy2022 blocks during sub build scan (9 blocks of 10K rows)
not_used — custom filtered hash adsh_code→{name_code,cik} built at runtime from sub scan; pre-built maps to row_id only and does not carry name_code+cik

precision.reason: num.value max = 1e14; double SUM produces last-digit errors at this scale
precision.method: int64_t cents: iv = llround(v * 100.0); sum_cents += iv
precision.having_comparison: compare int64_t sum_cents against int64_t avg_cents threshold
precision.avg_computation: avg_cents = (double)total_cik_sum / (double)ncik; threshold as double for comparison

subquery_strategy.description: Main GROUP BY (name_code,cik) and HAVING subquery GROUP BY cik are logically identical scans. Fuse into one pass: each qualifying num row updates both group_sum[packed_key] and cik_sum[cik] simultaneously.
having_steps: After merge: iterate cik_sum, sum all values → total_cik_cents; count entries → ncik
Filter group_sum: keep entries where sum_cents > avg_cents
Emit top-100 by sum_cents DESC using min-heap

key_encoding.rationale: name_code and cik are both int32_t; packing into uint64_t enables single-instruction key comparison (C15)

output.decode: name string via sub/name_dict.txt at output time (C18); cik as raw int32_t
